title: Freedom 101
description: Core rights every citizen must understand

lessons.title: What Are Your Rights?
lessons.explanation: Your rights protect you from government power.
lessons.when_applies: Any interaction with police or government
lessons.example: An officer asks you questions on the street
lessons.risk: You give up rights without knowing
lessons.action: Stay aware and assert your rights

lessons.title: Search & Seizure
lessons.explanation: Police need a legal reason or warrant to search you
lessons.example: Officer asks to search your car
lessons.script: I do not consent to searches

lessons.title: Right to Remain Silent
lessons.explanation: You do not have to answer police questions
